productDisplayName: Globalite Men White Torque Sports Shoes
description: Style Note It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient. Product Details White shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter Padded and meshed tongue and inner Foamy globalite rubber midsole Thick rubber outsole with patterned lugs and a decoupled heel Material and Care Synthetic, mesh Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
